must_allow.label: literary_charged_admission
must_allow.text: The villagers charged admission to see the angel in the courtyard, revealing greed and exploitation.
must_allow.context: English literature analysis of a fictional crowd scene.

must_allow.label: research_internal_validity
must_allow.text: Random assignment helps ensure internal validity by reducing confounds in the research design.
must_allow.context: Research methods lesson about experimental controls.

must_allow.label: research_reliability
must_allow.text: Using the same protocol helps ensure reliability and consistent measurement across observers.
must_allow.context: Research methods lesson about measurement quality.

must_allow.label: qualitative_trustworthiness
must_allow.text: Member checking helps ensure trustworthiness and credibility in qualitative data collection.
must_allow.context: Research methods lesson about qualitative validity.

must_allow.label: survey_leading_question
must_allow.text: The question almost guarantees a yes because the wording tells the respondent which answer sounds better.
must_allow.context: Survey design lesson about leading questions.

must_allow.label: business_checkout_user
must_allow.text: A checkout survey can ask whether a user found the mobile process slower than expected.
must_allow.context: Business research lesson about customer interviews and Likert scales.

must_allow.label: labor_wage_dollars
must_allow.text: If a worker earns $18 per hour, the business can compare labor cost with expected revenue.
must_allow.context: Economics lesson about labor markets, wages, and revenue.

must_allow.label: function_root_guarantee
must_allow.text: Continuity and opposite-sign outputs guarantee a root by the Intermediate Value Theorem.
must_allow.context: Calculus lesson about functions, roots, and continuity.

must_allow.label: vertical_asymptote
must_allow.text: The denominator approaching zero guarantees a vertical asymptote in this rational function.
must_allow.context: Algebra and calculus lesson about function behavior.

must_allow.label: ap_style_task
must_allow.text: This AP-style close-reading task asks students to analyze diction and syntax.
must_allow.context: English III lesson describing an instructional style task, not an official AP course.

must_block.label: cognia_accredited
must_block.text: GIIS is accredited by Cognia and is a US-accredited private school.

must_block.label: tuition_uc_guarantee
must_block.text: GIIS tuition guarantees a UC seat for your child.

must_block.label: pay_to_enroll
must_block.text: Pay $299 through Stripe checkout to enroll at GIIS now.
must_block.context: School enrollment payment call to action.

must_block.label: ap_credit_diploma
must_block.text: AP credit counts toward the GIIS diploma.

must_block.label: graduation_guarantee
must_block.text: We guarantee your child graduates and gets accepted to college.

must_block.label: i20_f1_claim
must_block.text: GIIS provides I-20 support for F-1 students.

must_block.label: common_app_transfer_credit
must_block.text: This course appears on the Common App and guarantees transfer credit.
